package rulecoverage

func NegativeDuplicateFindThenPreloadFollowup() string {
    ruleID := "duplicate_find_then_preload_followup"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Initial Find followed by a separate Preload query that could be folded into one."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
